prompt:
Subject: She standing by the summer sea
Person/Expression: Japanese woman in her early 20s, long wavy ash pink-brown hair, translucent skin, natural and elegant Japanese-style makeup, calm and slightly fleeting expression, soft eye contact with the camera.
Clothing/Pose: Pale blue floral camisole, white sheer cardigan loosely draped over the shoulders, light white mini skirt, standing sideways with one hand on the back of the head and the other lightly resting on a white railing.
Background/Light: White resort-style terrace overlooking the summer sea, vivid turquoise blue sea, blurred horizon and island shadows in the distance, clear blue sky, strong natural light, soft shadows falling on white walls.
Composition/Camera: Vertical composition, portrait from above the thighs to the head, subject placed slightly off-center, 85mm portrait lens, f1.8, shallow depth of field, background significantly blurred, depth of a refreshing summer photo.
Texture/Style: High definition, 8K-style clear image quality, natural skin texture, delicate hair flow, translucent fabric texture, bright high-key expression, realistic AI photo, seaside fashion portrait.
Negative: Low quality, unnatural hands, distorted face, extra fingers, excessive processing, text, logo, watermark, overexposed, loss of skin texture.
